task: R3 G1 remains external-evidence blocked after post-interruption verification; live NO-GO with safe no-operator hardening applied
required_law: A2 kill switch must trip on heartbeat lost, reconcile finding threshold breach, WS gap threshold breach, unknown-side-effect threshold breach, drawdown threshold breach, or manual operator arm.
RiskAllocator.can_allocate() must distinguish OPTIMISTIC_EXPOSURE from CONFIRMED_EXPOSURE; optimistic exposure counts against capacity at a lower configured weight, confirmed exposure at full weight.
A2 may block or reduce-only new risk but must not place live orders, mutate production DB/state artifacts, activate credentials, promote strategies, or authorize CLOB cutover.
Per-market, per-event, per-resolution-window, and correlated exposure caps must fail closed with structured reasons.
A2 config defaults must be sane if config/risk_caps.yaml is absent; operator tuning is not a prerequisite for engineering closeout.

Runtime ExecutionIntent allocation metadata must be populated by production entry construction, not only test-only dynamic attributes.
A2 kill-switch reasons must block entry and exit submit paths before persistence or SDK contact; reduce-only exits may continue only when no kill-switch reason is active.
src/contracts/AGENTS.md

A2 maker/taker order-type selection must be behavior-changing: selected order_type must reach heartbeat gating, VenueSubmissionEnvelope persistence, SUBMIT_REQUESTED/SUBMIT_ACKED evidence, and Polymarket V2 adapter submit.
INV-NEW-S: LIVE deployment requires 17/17 G1 gate PASS plus at least one staged-live-smoke environment passing the same readiness suite.

G1 may implement and run readiness checks, but it must not place, cancel, redeem, deploy, transition CutoverGuard to LIVE_ENABLED, mutate production DB/state artifacts, activate credentials, or promote live strategies.
Missing Q1/staged-smoke/operator evidence must fail closed; CI/engineering green must not masquerade as live deploy authorization.
The live-money-deploy-go operator gate remains blocking even if the readiness script and tests are green.
architecture/script_manifest.yaml
F3 TIGGE open-gate fetch may read only operator-approved local JSON payloads; external TIGGE archive HTTP/GRIB remains unimplemented and operator/data-source gated.
When model=tigge is operator-enabled, ensemble_client must route through the registered ForecastIngestProtocol adapter rather than Open-Meteo HTTP.
Missing TIGGE operator payload configuration must fail closed with TIGGEIngestFetchNotConfigured, not fabricate data.
User-channel position_lots are positive exposure only for ENTRY/BUY; EXIT/SELL venue trade facts must not mint active exposure.
Readiness evidence must be signed JSON under canonical evidence roots; arbitrary marker files and production --evidence-root overrides cannot satisfy G1.
Test-harness allow fixtures are unit isolation only and cannot be cited as production fail-open evidence.
